Meaning.Vi: Sự công nhận, sự cho phép tham gia
Meaning.En: The act of allowing someone to enter a group, institution, or event, or the right to do so.
Meaning.Example: She received an acceptance letter after the admission process was completed.

Situation.Vi: Sinh viên nộp hồ sơ và phỏng vấn để được vào đại học.
Situation.En: A student submits documents and attends an interview to gain entry to a university.

Situation.Vi: Bệnh nhân được vào khoa cấp cứu sau khi được kiểm tra sơ bộ.
Situation.En: The patient was admitted to the emergency department after initial screening.

Meaning.En: A formal statement acknowledging the truth of a fact or a confession, especially in a legal context.
Meaning.Example: His lawyer advised him not to make any admission before consulting with counsel.

Situation.Vi: Bị cáo đưa ra lời thú nhận trước tòa để giảm nhẹ hình phạt.
Situation.En: The defendant made an admission in court to seek a reduced sentence.

Meaning.Vi: Phí vào cửa, phí tham dự
Meaning.En: The fee charged for entry to a place or event.
Meaning.Example: The admission to the museum is free for children under 12.

Situation.Vi: Khách phải mua vé để vào buổi hòa nhạc.
Situation.En: Attendees must purchase admission tickets to enter the concert.
